form.formComment: Returns from a 38-day let-up. Last start 7th of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather on March 4 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Advancing carrying 59.5kg at $6.50. Rates highly on best form so he can turn things around.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months won by a nose at Lingfield All Weather March 25 over 2400m defeating Analogical carrying 60kg at $10. Previously second-up 5th of 10 at Wolverhampton on December 1 over 2400m, 11 len behind Codiak carrying 59kg at $2.60. Looks hard to beat again.
